name: GBK19-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the rail route from Glasgow to Kilmarnock via Barrhead and the branch to East Kilbride.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2020 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / GBK19 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89-GBR [OSNet v2009] to GBK19-IRF (1) (code 9454) used in conjunction with the GBK19-TM map projection (code 9455).
